name: Specialty Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, brown the meat, uncovered, in the microwave for 4 minutes. Stir occasionally to break up meat chunks.
2. Drain excess fat from the bowl.
3. Add onions and heat, uncovered, in the microwave for 3 minutes or until the onion is tender.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the meat mixture. Pour into a shallow, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
5. Heat, uncovered, in the microwave for 9 minutes or until the sauce is bubbly.
